message:
fix(config): set xhigh token budget default to u32::MAX (effectively unlimited)

Change the default fallback for the "xhigh" token budget tier from 32768
to u32::MAX. The xhigh tier is intended as an uncapped mode for contexts
where maximum output length is desired (e.g., large refactors, full-file
generation). The previous 32768 default was too restrictive and could
silently truncate output in scenarios where xhigh was explicitly selected
to avoid limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
